content.text: Hi! How can I help you today?
I’m doing great, thanks for asking! How are you doing? What can I help you with today?

I can do that. I found Aryan in your contacts: aryanjainak@gmail.com — is that the right person?

Please share:
- Subject
- Message body (or I can draft one)
- Any CC/BCC or attachments
- Send now or schedule (e.g., Monday 9:00 AM IST)

If you want a quick start, I can send:
Subject: Quick check-in
Body: Hi Aryan, hope you’re doing well. Just wanted to touch base—do you have a few minutes to chat this week? Thanks!  
Shall I use this?

Got it—do you want me to email Nayan now (instead of Aryan)?

I couldn’t find Nayan in your contacts. Please share:
- Nayan’s email address
- Subject
- Message body (or I can draft one)
- Any CC/BCC or attachments
- Send now or schedule a time

If you want a quick draft, I can send:
Subject: Quick check-in
Body: Hi Nayan, hope you’re doing well. Just wanted to touch base—do you have a few minutes to chat this week? Thanks!

Share Nayan’s email and I’ll send it right away.
